base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of world_2_4_layout — a tile (level_layout) from 1985 super mario bros. Second castle — faster fire-bars + Podoboos (fireballs jumping from lava). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Second castle — faster fire-bars + Podoboos (fireballs jumping from lava); second fake-Bowser.
